_comment: Gravekeeper mutterings (0.8.5). Sanctuary is a server-side mod: vanilla clients cannot resolve these keys, so the server reads this file at runtime (KeeperMutterLines) and sends the resolved literal text. Kept in lang/en_us.json form so it is translator-recognizable and i18n-ready if the mod ever ships a client half. Edit the strings freely; the framing key wraps the chosen line.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.4: I remember every one of you.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.6: the flowers know what I know.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.7: sleep, and trouble me no more.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.9: dig if you like — the ground gives nothing back.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.10: so many… and room for so many more.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.12: the dead keep better secrets than the living.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.13: mind the graves, or join them.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.15: a spade, a stone, a name. that's all any of us gets.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.16: the quiet ones give me the least trouble.
sanctuary.gravekeeper.mutter.17: worms and roots and time. that's the whole of it.
